selections.name: Too Many Mikes
selections.reason: Drops into MSW company and boasts a massive 112 speed figure. Class rating of 98 gets a boost from the Tier 1 par adjustment. Stalking style fits the long Churchill stretch.

selections.name: Pure Joy
selections.reason: Consistent figures (103 speed, 111 class) and tactical speed. Should get a clean trip from the outside post.

selections.name: Plaza Cue
selections.reason: Experienced runner with a 111 class rating. Has been facing tough company and the cutback to a fairer track dynamic helps.

selections.name: Ati Girl
selections.reason: Solid 105 speed/class combo. Needs to prove she can handle the distance but has the back class to compete.

danger_horse.name: Island Girl
danger_horse.reason: Classy filly with a 106 class rating. If the pace melts down, she will be rolling late.

selections.name: Happy Away
selections.reason: Wesley Ward 2-year-old with Irad Ortiz Jr. aboard. Typical early speed profile that dominates these short juvenile sprints.

selections.name: Sargent Bilko
selections.reason: Kenneally first-timer drawing the rail. Jose Ortiz takes the mount, indicating strong stable confidence.

selections.name: Tigrado
selections.reason: Showed speed in debut at Keeneland before yielding. Experience is a huge plus in these early season baby races.

selections.name: Uncle With Money
selections.reason: Rey Hernandez trainee who gained valuable experience on debut. Outside draw is favorable for a clean break.

danger_horse.name: Mo Surprises
danger_horse.reason: Outside post allows for a clean tracking trip if the inside speed duel collapses.

selections.name: Lady Orient
selections.reason: Drops in class and projects to get a perfect stalking trip. 101 speed figure is legitimate and fits the Churchill bias perfectly.

selections.name: Barbratina
selections.reason: Classy mare dropping from allowance company. 109 class rating is the highest in the field. Major threat if she fires her best.

selections.name: Saint Nancy S
selections.reason: Consistent 98 speed/class ratings. Tactical speed allows her to sit just off the pace and pounce in the long stretch.

selections.name: Mint Driven
selections.reason: Pace projector shows she can sit a mid-pack trip. Figures are slightly below the top two but can hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Champagne Nights
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could force her hand early. If she gets loose, she could be tough to reel in.

selections.name: Lord Majesty
selections.reason: Gaffalione rides for Jacobson. 106 speed figure towers over this field. Should sit a perfect pressing trip.

selections.name: Hocus
selections.reason: Veteran gelding with a 104 speed figure. Outside draw keeps him out of trouble. Will be flying late down the long stretch.

selections.name: Illini
selections.reason: Drawn inside with tactical speed. 102 speed figure makes him a major contender if he secures position early.

selections.name: Upturned Brim
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 106 speed figure. Needs pace to run at but fits the class level perfectly.

danger_horse.name: Bet On Bret
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on his best day. Do not ignore in exotics.

selections.name: Wistucky
selections.reason: Classy runner with a 105 speed figure. Drops into a favorable spot and gets Luis Saez. Rail draw is the only minor concern.

selections.name: Exploration
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz Jr. takes the mount. 105 class rating shows he belongs here. Tactical speed fits the 6.5F distance perfectly.

selections.name: Baytown Bruiser
selections.reason: Boasts a 107 speed figure. Gaffalione rides. Will be pressing the pace and has the stamina to hold on.

selections.name: Tiger's Legacy
selections.reason: Outside draw is ideal for his stalking style. 105 speed figure puts him right in the mix for the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Bridge Classic
danger_horse.reason: Lightly raced and improving. Could take a step forward at a price.

selections.name: Blasphemous Rumors
selections.reason: First-time starter for Albert Stall Jr. Works are solid and finds a very weak field for her debut.

selections.name: Cocoa Nimbus
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability. 94 class rating is competitive here. Needs to put it all together.

selections.name: Dancewhenyoucan
selections.reason: 93 speed and class ratings. Drops in class and should appreciate the easier company.

selections.name: Cookie Time
selections.reason: Rail draw. Has some early speed and could hang around for a piece of the exotics in a paceless race.

danger_horse.name: Mariposa Moon
danger_horse.reason: Drops in class and gets a jockey upgrade. Could wake up at a price.

selections.name: Classy'n Connected
selections.reason: Strong 108 speed figure. Brian Hernandez Jr. rides. Stalking style is perfect for the Churchill turf course.

selections.name: Dozen Diamonds
selections.reason: Consistent turf router with a 106 speed figure. Outside draw shouldn't be an issue with the long run into the first turn.

selections.name: Goodbetterbest
selections.reason: Massive 114 speed figure on her best day. Gaffalione takes the mount. Major threat if she gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Jill Jitterbug
selections.reason: 109 speed figure. Will be closing late and the long stretch plays right into her hooves.

danger_horse.name: Missy Bee
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw saves ground. 109 speed figure shows she has the back class to upset.

selections.name: Shadow Coast
selections.reason: With multiple scratches, the pace scenario favors him. 107 speed figure and Luis Saez aboard make him the clear one to beat.

selections.name: Guardian
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz Jr. rides. 101 speed figure. Should get a perfect tracking trip behind the speed.

selections.name: Where Y'at
selections.reason: Outside draw keeps him out of the kickback. 107 speed figure shows he can contend if the top two falter.

selections.name: Mr. Sensei
selections.reason: Consistent mid-90s figures. Will be picking up the pieces late for the bottom of the exotics.

danger_horse.name: War Munny
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and Gaffalione. Could get brave if left alone on the lead.

selections.name: Zeitlos
selections.reason: Elite Grade 1 class (115 rating) and a 114 speed figure. Asmussen/Ortiz combo. The long stretch is perfect for her late kick.

selections.name: One Magic Philly
selections.reason: Drawn inside with a 112 speed figure. Gaffalione will have her placed prominently. Very dangerous.

selections.name: Jersey Pearl
selections.reason: Classy mare with a 117 class rating. Will be pressing the pace and has the stamina to stick around.

selections.name: Mink's Palace
selections.reason: Solid 111 speed and class ratings. Saez rides. A legitimate threat to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Asternia
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw and Rosario. Will be flying late if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Without (ire)
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz Jr. rides this classy import. 109 class rating. Should get a perfect ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Treaty Of Rome
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with Gaffalione. 110 class rating. Will be rolling late down the center of the course.

selections.name: Seven Wonders
selections.reason: Massive 117 speed figure. Rosario takes the mount. A major player if he replicates his best effort.

selections.name: Ashley's Archer
selections.reason: Mark Casse trainee with Jose Ortiz. 108 speed figure. Tactical speed keeps him out of trouble.

danger_horse.name: The Dover Specter
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw. 108 speed figure shows he can compete with these on his best day.
